system.description: You augment your AI to access the full potential of the gift. When you're hacking, include your D10 in the roll.

upgrades.name: Information Database
upgrades.description: Choose its specialist subject. The smaller the area, the more complete the knowledge.

upgrades.name: Hacking Protocol Interface
upgrades.description: If you manually interface with a system, you're immune to any physical feedback on a failure.

upgrades.name: Subpersonality
upgrades.description: The AI simulates a single known person, living or dead, who can be interrogated and questioned.

upgrades.name: BioHacking Extension
upgrades.description: Choose one group of creatures; you can hack them like Fallen.

upgrades.name: Fallen Leash
upgrades.description: You can control a hacked Fallen indefinitely, as if you'd rolled a Special every round. You can control one Fallen at one time for each time you've taken this upgrade.
